benefits.description: Significant reduction in endometriosis pain; entire day with no pain after 3+ years of continuous pain
Visible reduction in prominent surgical scar in bikini area
General improvement to quality of life

protocol_notes: 5 mg vial reconstituted with approximately 3-4 mL bacteriostatic water. Using a 29G 1cc insulin syringe, pulled to 20 tick mark total: 10 ticks suspended in water and ingested orally, 10 ticks injected subcutaneously in thigh or abdomen. OP is a certified medical assistant. Had two prior surgeries. Also taking Meldonium/Mexidol, Lithium, a stimulant, and various supplements. On 30 MME pain medication. Planned cycle length ~28 days with breaks thereafter. Updating report daily.
